user_story: As an Employee, I want to view a list of assets assigned to me with details like requisition number, asset name, serial number and assigned date, so that I can track the assets in my possession
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Asset List screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for requisition number, requested asset, asset name, requested by, serial number, assigned on, to be returned on, status and task

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my assets by a period with From and To dates, so that I can find assets assigned within a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Asset List screen; When I select a From and To date and click Search; Then only assets within that period are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my assets by status such as Acknowledged/Issued, Pending for Receipt Acknowledgement, Pending for confirm return or Returned, so that I can focus on assets in a particular state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Asset List screen; When I select a status and click Search; Then only assets matching that status are listed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the filters, so that I can clear my selections and view all my assets again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period or status filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters are cleared and the full list is shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see the return due date for each assigned asset, so that I can return assets on time
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an asset with a return date; When I view the list; Then the To be returned on date is displayed for that asset
